prestazioni: Twin-turbocharged 6.0L V8 (engine code: **HTE V8 Twin-Turbo**) upgraded with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (84mm billet compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) paired with **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegates and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for precise boost control at 22 psi (stock: 14 psi).

Custom **AEM Infinity 10** standalone ECU with **Vector-specific fuel system** upgrades: **Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps** (dual setup), **Injector Dynamics ID2000x** (2000cc/min) injectors, and **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator** (adjustable base pressure to 58 psi).

Drivetrain reinforcement with **PPG 5-speed dog-ring transmission** (sequential shift kit), **Tilton 7.25" triple-disc carbon clutch**, and **Quaife ATB differential** (80% lockup) paired with **Vector-specific half-shafts** from **The Driveshaft Shop** (3.5" chromoly steel, rated for 1,200 lb-ft torque).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Vektor W8 Widebody Kit** (Pandem Designs) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-molded to Vector’s signature nose) and **adjustable rear diffuser** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** with 3-position angle control).

**BBS LM-R 19x12" (front) / 20x13" (rear) forged wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/35/19 front, 335/30/20 rear) with **HRE Performance Center Lock** adapters for rapid wheel changes.

**Full custom interior** by **Recaro Pole Position** (carbon-Kevlar hybrid shell) with **Schroth Profi II-6 harnesses**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (quick-release hub), and **Vector-specific digital dash** (AEM CD-7 with **Vector W8 logo startup animation**).
